item.title: Road Trip Nightmare: Stranded 4000 Miles Away
item.description: A road trip takes an unexpected turn when a breakdown or major issue leaves the journey stranded far from home. How did things go so wrong so far away?

media:content.media:title: Road Trip Nightmare: Stranded 4000 Miles Away
media:content.media:description: A road trip takes an unexpected turn when a breakdown or major issue leaves the journey stranded far from home. How did things go so wrong so far away?

item.title: Powerful 16-Cylinder Detroit Diesel Roars
item.description: A look at a powerful 16-cylinder Detroit Diesel in action, highlighting the sound and mechanical presence of a large diesel engine. What stands out most about this build?

item.title: How To Fix Worn-Out Milwaukee M18 Battery
item.description: How To Fix Worn-Out Milwaukee M18 Battery. A practical look at restoring a worn Milwaukee M18 battery with a straightforward repair process. #milwaukee #fix What steps are involved?

item.title: F350 Engine Swap: 7.3 IDI to 3126

item.title: Technique That Gets Rid of Rust
item.description: A proven method is put to work to remove rust, restore metal surfaces, and prevent further corrosion. How effective is this technique on heavily rusted parts?

item.title: Will the Cheapest Plasma Cutter Handle It?
item.description: A hands-on look at whether the cheapest plasma cutter can handle the job. Follow the build process and see how it performs in the garage. Will it get the cut done?

media:content.media:description: A hands-on look at whether the cheapest plasma cutter can handle the job. Follow the build process and see how it performs in the garage. Will it get the cut done?
